name: Soreheim Proper
inside: Tower-bases burn with magma forges, mid-levels pulse with workshops and arsenals, and upper crowns hold governance chambers, observatories, archives, and foreign delegations.
interior_patterns: work is visibly part of daily life.
Local values show in small habits, not just formal ritual.
The difference between who belongs, who is tolerated, and who draws scrutiny becomes legible quickly once inside.
